title: hieracium diaphanoides subsp. subelegans
intro: Hieracium diaphanoides subsp. subelegans, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to stimulate the digestive system. The health benefits of Hieracium diaphanoides subsp. subelegans include its potential to aid in the treatment of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Hieracium diaphanoides subsp. subelegans typically involves infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
